sensemaking_contract.output: single shadow gold thesis with proof, blockers, stale penalties, and next actions

blockers.reason: Replay lab is still attention-gated.
21 safety blocker(s) visible.
Auris nodes, lambda, HNC, quantum, and probability systems are not fully passing for GOLD logic.
One or more GOLD action metrics are stale, missing timestamp proof, reference-only, or not directly verified.
GOLD high-frequency path is not both fast and prediction-validated.
GOLD historical replay has not yet proven validated prediction behavior.

buy_contract.when: Only when fresh forecast and driver proof make the upside target exceed ask plus cost and 3p floor.

three_p_profit_floor_gate.entry_instruction: buy only at or below current ask after fresh proof
rules: Never enter unless expected net profit is at least 0.03 after spread and slippage.
Use fresh bid/ask and chart proof before choosing BUY or SELL.
Use the smallest proven size first; scale only after repeatable shadow proof.
Live orders remain blocked unless existing runtime, risk, credential, and execution gates pass.

sell_contract.when: Only when fresh forecast and driver proof make the downside target exceed bid minus cost and 3p floor.

tool_activation_plan.expected_output: Fresh Capital GOLD quote, related gold instruments, spread, market status, and timestamp proof.
USD/DXY, yields, inflation, oil, VIX, calendar, and news context with source timestamps.
Shadow-only direction thesis with confidence, contradiction checks, and no order mutation.
Tick, 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, and session GOLD projections with source tickers, outcome validation, hit/miss, and shadow P/L proof.
Fresh GOLD target stream plus related context lanes, waveform edge score, trigger side, blockers, and shadow-only margin candidate.
Validated history analogs mapped into future GOLD windows with HNC confidence effect and blockers.
Many source-grounded GOLD edge dreams converted into validation queue items without action authority.
Chart replay, lead-lag candidates, order-book pressure proof, waveform regime state, and attribution gaps.
Dynamic Capital GOLD target monitoring plus Alpaca ETF/miner, Binance/Kraken crypto-liquidity, energy, USD/rates, and risk proxy watchlists.
All margin, sizing, risk, profit, and position systems point at Capital GOLD as the target mission while live mutation remains gated.
Coherence, sensory pressure, stale-data penalty, and safety blocker report.
Agent-created GOLD support jobs, local tools, UI panels, tests, and clear chat summaries with proof.

manual_truth: Real Capital GOLD bid/ask must be fresh.
Every action signal must carry source path, timestamp, freshness, and verification class.
Shadow forecast and UI charts are display-only until source proof passes.
verified_real_data_gate.policy: No fake, scaffolded, stale, synthetic, reference-only, or visual-only metric can unlock action.

shadow_artifact_checks.reason: Forecast bands are derived from evidence and never unlock action without fresh source proof.
Browser charts explain evidence; they do not create market truth.
